violations.rule_title: Todo show command must use verb
violations.description: Commands showing todo details must use verb form like 'show' not 'info' or 'display'

violations.rule_title: Sink show command must use 'sink <id>' not 'show-sink'
violations.description: For secondary objects where parent context is implicit, use 'foobar <id>' not 'show-foobar'
